title: WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY DCHS YOUTH AND FAMILY SERVICES DIVISION WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Participants will receive an energy audit of the home. Weatherization measures may include insulation, furnace inspection, heating duct improvements, air sealing, ventilation, and energy education. 209 SW 4th Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Low-income residents living in single-family homes, mobile homes, and apartments Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 988-7423 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-7423 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for eligibility screening or visit website to complete pre-screener FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS LEGAL SERVICES - SNAP OUTREACH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY DCHS YOUTH AND FAMILY SERVICES DIVISION
